string 2:
Ooh! Did you come to see those incredible cosplayers, too?
They were just here!

I've never seen such perfect costumes! They were totally on
another level!

I wish I could've talked to them, but... I just didn't have
the guts!
{next}I'll go scope things out.
{next}What made their costumes so good?
{next}I'm sure you could've said something!
Seriously?! Wow, you're, like, super brave!

It was, like... they just stepped out of the other side!
Like, they weren't of this world!

Hmm... your costume's pretty good, too, but those legends I
just saw were even better.

They were a two-person team. I saw them chatting as they
headed for the back alleys.

They can't have gone far. If you're a cosplayer, too, you've
just GOT to see them!

Those cosplayers headed for the back alleys. The sight of
them could change your life!

We've never had the chance to relax and stroll around on our
own like this before.

Tell me about it. You know, it's funny. I'd never have
imagined talking to YOU like this.

Back when you were still BlackGatomon, communication was
hardly your strong suit.

I barely knew any words then! And you weren't exactly quick
to open your heart to Digimon.
But I was determined to make you my friend!

I learned so many words just to talk to you. I doubt I'd
have done it without Digivolving.

That happened back when I was repairing the
electromagnetic net generator, right?
That's right.
I remember you calling out to me...

Are you hurt?! And all because you protected me... Help is
on the way! Hang in there!

All the generators have been activated, and the others
headed off to meet Dr. Simmons.

None of that... would have happened... if it weren't for
you...!
Will...
...Huh?
Will you... be... my friend...?
You... want to be friends... with me?
You... don't?

A Digimon... and a human? Friends? I've... never even
thought about that before.
But with you... Yes, I think we could be friends.

Thanks for saving me, BlackGatomon. Now let me be the one to
ask. Will you be friends wi—
Ngh... Urgh...!
Hey! Are... Are you all right? Please, stay with me!

We've only just become friends! We haven't even had a chance
to talk yet!
I... want to be friends, too...
...Thank you.
What... What's happened to you?!

After that, you taught me so many words, over so many
conversations...

And you completely changed my values. I want to have a lot
more conversations like this.

And, you... Don't you think it's time you stopped
eavesdropping and joined in yourself?
{next}I heard everything.
{next}I just got here!
{next}Y-You're confusing me with someone else...
You did, huh? Well... that's a little embarrassing.

Oh, no. You can't fool me. I've known someone's been hanging
around for some time.

Sorry, but I've never seen anyone else walk around in that
getup.

We were reminiscing about how I Digivolved. As I recall, you
had something to do with it.

They were key to our strategy that day. We have them to
thank for our friendship, too.

When you put it that way, I suppose I wouldn't even be here 
without them.
In which case, I owe you my gratitude. Thank you.

Well, we'd better be going. We're going to enjoy a bit more
leisure time together.
See you around!
